'''ngagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rudimentally|rudimentally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rudimentally|rudimentally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngagate|ngagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngagatesher|ngagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagatesherĂ«m|ngagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngagatero|ngagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngagateshĂ«|ngagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagateshĂ«m|ngagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingagatero|gokingagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingagateshĂ«|gokingagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagateshĂ«m|gokingagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongagankerom|gongagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongagankeshĂ«|gongagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagankeshĂ«m|gongagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongagankeya|gongagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngagaterom|ngagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagatemu|ngagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngagateya|ngagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingagaterom|gokingagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagatemu|gokingagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingagateya|gokingagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngagagate|ngagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngagagatesher|ngagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagagatesherĂ«m|ngagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngagagatero|ngagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngagagateshĂ«|ngagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagagateshĂ«m|ngagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingagagatero|gokingagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingagagateshĂ«|gokingagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagagateshĂ«m|gokingagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongagagankerom|gongagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongagagankeshĂ«|gongagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagagankeshĂ«m|gongagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongagagankeya|gongagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngagagaterom|ngagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagagatemu|ngagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngagagateya|ngagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingagagaterom|gokingagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagagatemu|gokingagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingagagateya|gokingagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠte|ngĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠtesher|ngĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠtero|ngĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠgĂŠtero|gokingĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠterom|ngĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠtemu|ngĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠgĂŠteya|ngĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠgĂŠterom|gokingĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠgĂŠteya|gokingĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafgafte|ngafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafgaftesher|ngafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafgaftesherĂ«m|ngafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafgaftero|ngafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafgafteshĂ«|ngafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafgafteshĂ«m|ngafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafgaftero|gokingafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafgafteshĂ«|gokingafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafgafteshĂ«m|gokingafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafgafnkerom|gongafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafgafnkeshĂ«|gongafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafgafnkeshĂ«m|gongafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafgafnkeya|gongafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafgafterom|ngafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafgaftemu|ngafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafgafteya|ngafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafgafterom|gokingafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafgaftemu|gokingafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafgafteya|gokingafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
